title: SpaceX-Tesla merger chatter reignites as Musk pushes rocket company toward Nasdaq
summary_full: With SpaceX headed for the public markets next month, industry experts and people close to Elon Musk are speculating about a potential tie-up with Tesla.
summary_public: With SpaceX headed for the public markets next month, industry experts and people close to Elon Musk are speculating about a potential tie-up with Tesla.
